composite.tuning_provenance: walk-forward grid 2019-2025 (tune_weights.py, reports/weight_tuning.md); conf_share=0.8, z_cap=1.5 chosen by majority of out-of-sample season selections

correlation.provenance: Phase 7.6 (docs/decisions_p7.md): correlation-aware MMR-style greedy selection using the 7.5 shrunk-rho artifact (data/correlation_structure.json); discounts a candidate's effective score by its max POSITIVE rho vs already-selected leans in the same game (never penalizes negative/diversifying pairs). See 7.6 section for the walk-forward ablation verdict.

ml_ranker.provenance: Phase 7.2 (docs/decisions_p7.md): ensemble bake-off (avg/meta of GBDT+RF OOS) found RF ALONE beats both, on the 7.1 calibrated-log-loss metric OOS 2022-2025 (0.62448->0.62118, t=6.75); walk-forward HP search found no improvement over RF's defaults (400 trees, min_leaf 25, sqrt features) or worth shipping for GBDT either (tuned GBDT still loses to RF, t=2.44). Feature pruning via ablation found real pooled dead weight but broke a per-market guardrail (passing_yards) when applied to RF -- NOT shipped; all 67 features retained. Shipped: RF, default hyperparams, all features, platt_permkt calibration (7.1, unchanged). Regenerate: python3 ml_test.py --stage fit --models rf --calibrate platt_permkt (or scripts/ship_rf.py's checkpointed stages on compute-constrained environments). Weekly retrain: --stage frame --append, then --stage fit.
